rationale: Section 25.192 governs notice of homestead exemption eligibility and contains no dollar amounts or references to the exemption value. Changing the exemption amount under §11.13(b) does not affect this notice provision.
quote: NOTICE: A residence homestead exemption from ad valorem taxation is NOT currently being allowed on the property listed below.
_note: No conflict. §25.192 addresses notification procedure, not exemption amount.
